summary: Comprehensive testing of Facette E-Commerce Platform (Turkish fashion e-commerce). Backend: 25/25 tests passed. Frontend: All major flows working correctly.

minor.issue: bs4 module was missing (ModuleNotFoundError) - appears to be fixed now based on logs showing successful XML import

integration_issues.issue: Direct URL /ara?q=elbise shows blank page - correct URL is /arama?q=elbise

issues: Category banner images not loading (showing gray placeholders) - likely no banner images uploaded yet

action_items: Consider adding a redirect from /ara to /arama for search URL consistency
Upload banner images for hero slider and category sections to enhance homepage appearance
critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret key is only 23 bytes - should be at least 32 bytes for SHA256 (warning in logs)
useEffect dependency warnings in multiple components (AuthContext, Category, Home, ProductDetail, Search, StaticPage, admin/Orders, admin/Products) - not critical but should be addressed
seed_data_creation: 246 products imported from XML, admin user created, categories seeded
context_for_next_testing_agent: E-commerce platform is fully functional. 246 products imported from facette.com.tr XML. Admin panel working with dashboard stats, product management. Cart, checkout flow ready. Search works via /arama?q= URL. All category navigation working.

features_tested.homepage: PASS - Products loading, menu working, hero section displayed
features_tested.category_menu: PASS - EN YENİLER, ELBİSE, BLUZ, PANTOLON, CEKET, AKSESUAR all working
features_tested.product_detail: PASS - Images, sizes, add to cart all functional
features_tested.add_to_cart: PASS - Cart drawer opens, shows product, total calculated
features_tested.search: PASS - Search modal works, results displayed correctly
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Stats showing (246 products, 1 order, 3 users, 1600 TL revenue)
features_tested.admin_products: PASS - Product list, search, edit, delete buttons working
features_tested.user_registration: PASS - Registration form available on /giris page
